gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/100)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ طَلَّقَ ثَلَاثاً فِي مَجْلِسٍ عَلَى غَيْرِ طُهْرٍ لَمْ يَكُنْ شَيْئاً إِنَّمَا الطَّلَاقُ الَّذِي أَمَرَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِهِ فَمَنْ خَالَفَ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ طَلَاقٌ وَ إِنَّ ابْنَ عُمَرَ طَلَّقَ امْرَأَتَهُ ثَلَاثاً فِي مَجْلِسٍ وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ فَأَمَرَهُ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَنْ يَنْكِحَهَا وَ لَا يَعْتَدَّ بِالطَّلَاقِ
قَالَ وَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ يَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِنِّي طَلَّقْتُ امْرَأَتِي قَالَ أَ لَكَ بَيِّنَةٌ قَالَ لَا فَقَالَ اعْزُبْ.

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abu Ayoub, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who divorces three (times) in one sitting upon other than purity (menstruation), will not amount to anything. But rather, the divorce is which Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Commanded has with. So the one who opposed, there would be no divorce for him, and that the son of Umar divorced his wife three (divorces) in one sitting, and she was menstruating. So the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> ordered that he should sleep with her and not to exceed with the divorce’.

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And a man came over to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>, so he said, ‘O Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>! I divorced my wife’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is there any proof (two witnesses) for you?’ He said, ‘No’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Single’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from abu Ayyub from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one divorces his wife in one place and time three times when she is experiencing Hayd (menses) such divorce does not have any valid effect. A valid divorce is that which Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has commanded. Whoever does otherwise it is not a divorce. Ibn ’Umar divorced his wife three times in one place and time when she experienced Hayd (menses). The Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, commanded him to go to bed with her and ignore that kind of divorce.’ He (the Imam) said, ’A man once came to ’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and said, ‘O ’Amir al-Mu’minin, I have divorced my wife.’ He (the Imam) asked, ‘Do you have witnesses?’ he replied, ‘No, I do not have any witnesses.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘You must disregard it.’”

translations.bn: মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে জাফার আবুল আব্বাস, আইউব ইবনে নূহ থেকে, তিনি সাফওয়ান থেকে, তিনি ইয়াকুব ইবনে শু'আইব থেকে বর্ণনা করেছেন যিনি বলেছেন: আমি আবু বাসিরকে বলতে শুনেছি:
translations.de: Muhammad ibn Ja'far Abu al-Abbas, von Ayyub ibn Nuh, von Safwan, von Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb, der sagte: Ich hörte Abu Basir sagen:
translations.en: Muhammad ibn Ja'far Abu al-Abbas, from Ayyub ibn Nuh, from Safwan, from Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb who said: I heard Abu Basir saying:
translations.es: Muhammad ibn Ja'far Abu al-Abbas, de Ayyub ibn Nuh, de Safwan, de Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb quien dijo: Escuché a Abu Basir decir:
translations.fa: محمد بن جعفر ابوالعباس از ایوب بن نوح، از صفوان، از یعقوب بن شعیب روایت کرد که گفت: شنیدم ابوبصیر می‌گوید:
translations.fr: Muhammad ibn Ja'far Abu al-Abbas, d'Ayyub ibn Nuh, de Safwan, de Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb qui dit : J'ai entendu Abu Basir dire :
translations.id: Muhammad bin Ja'far Abu al-Abbas, dari Ayyub bin Nuh, dari Safwan, dari Ya'qub bin Shu'ayb yang berkata: Aku mendengar Abu Basir berkata:
translations.ru: Мухаммад ибн Джа'фар Абу аль-Аббас, от Аyyуба ибн Нуха, от Сафвана, от Яъкуба ибн Шу'айба, который сказал: Я слышал, как Абу Басир говорил:
translations.tr: Muhammed b. Ca'fer Ebu'l-Abbas, Eyyüb b. Nuh'tan, o Safvan'dan, o Ya'kub b. Şuayb'dan dedi ki: Ebu Basîr'in şöyle dediğini işittim:
translations.ur: محمد بن جعفر ابو العباس نے ایوب بن نوح سے، انہوں نے صفوان سے، انہوں نے یعقوب بن شعیب سے روایت کی کہ انہوں نے کہا: میں نے ابو بصیر کو کہتے ہوئے سنا:
translations.zh: 穆罕默德·本·贾法尔·阿布·阿巴斯，从艾尤布·本·努哈，从萨夫万，从雅各布·本·舒艾卜传述，他说：我听到阿布·巴西尔说：

translations.bn: আমি আবু জাফার আলাইহিস সালামকে এমন একজন মহিলার বিষয়ে জিজ্ঞেস করেছিলাম যাকে তার স্বামী সুন্নাহর বিরুদ্ধে তালাক দিয়েছিল, এবং আমরা বললাম যে তারা একটি পরিবার এবং কেউ তাদের সম্পর্কে জানে না। তখন তিনি বললেন: এটি কিছুই নয় (অর্থাৎ তালাক বাতিল)।
translations.de: Ich fragte Abu Ja'far (Friede sei mit ihm) nach einer Frau, deren Mann sie entgegen der Sunna geschieden hatte, und wir sagten, dass sie eine Familie sind und niemand sie kennt. Da sagte er: Es ist nichts (d.h. die Scheidung ist nichtig und ungültig).
translations.en: I asked Abu Ja'far (peace be upon him) about a woman whose husband had divorced her contrary to the Sunnah, and we said that they are a private family and no one knows them. So he said: It is not anything (i.e., the divorce is null and void).
translations.es: Pregunté a Abu Ja'far (la paz sea con él) sobre una mujer a quien su esposo había divorciado contrariamente a la Sunnah, y dijimos que ellos son una familia y nadie los conoce. Entonces dijo: No es nada (es decir, el divorcio es nulo e inválido).
translations.fa: از ابوجعفر علیه السلام درباره زنی پرسیدم که شوهرش او را برخلاف سنت طلاق داده بود، و گفتیم که آنها یک خانواده هستند و هیچ کس از آنها خبر ندارد. پس فرمود: چیزی نیست (یعنی طلاق باطل است).
translations.fr: J'ai demandé à Abu Ja'far (que la paix soit sur lui) au sujet d'une femme que son mari avait répudiée contrairement à la Sunna, et nous avons dit qu'ils forment une famille et que personne ne les connaît. Il dit alors : Cela n'est rien (c'est-à-dire que le divorce est nul et non avenu).
translations.id: Aku bertanya kepada Abu Ja'far (alaihis salam) tentang seorang wanita yang diceraikan suaminya bertentangan dengan sunnah, dan kami berkata bahwa mereka adalah sebuah keluarga dan tidak ada seorang pun yang mengenal mereka. Maka beliau bersabda: Itu tidak sah (yakni perceraian tersebut batal).
translations.ru: Я спросил Абу Джа'фара (мир ему) о женщине, которую её муж развёл вопреки Сунне, и мы сказали, что они — семья и никто их не знает. Тогда он сказал: Это ничто (т.е. развод недействителен).
translations.tr: Ebu Ca'fer'e (a.s.) kocasının sünnete aykırı olarak boşadığı bir kadın hakkında sordum; biz de dedik ki onlar aile bireyidir ve onları kimse tanımıyor. Bunun üzerine buyurdu: Bir şey değildir (yani boşama geçersizdir).
translations.ur: میں نے ابو جعفر علیہ السلام سے اس عورت کے بارے میں سوال کیا جسے اس کے شوہر نے سنت کے خلاف طلاق دی تھی، اور ہم نے کہا کہ وہ ایک گھرانہ ہے اور کوئی انہیں نہیں جانتا۔ تو آپ نے فرمایا: یہ کچھ بھی نہیں ہے (یعنی طلاق باطل ہے)۔
translations.zh: 我询问阿布·贾法尔（愿主赐他平安）关于一位被丈夫以违背圣行的方式休妻的妇女，我们说他们是一户人家，没有人认识他们。他说：这不算什么（即离婚无效）。

diacritics_changes: Added full tashkeel to narrator chain: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ, أَيُّوبَ بْنِ نُوحٍ, صَفْوَانَ, يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ شُعَيْبٍ
Added tashkeel to body text: سَمِعْتُ, يَقُولُ, سَأَلْتُ, طَلَّقَهَا, زَوْجُهَا, لِغَيْرِ, وَقُلْنَا, إِنَّهُمْ, وَلَمْ, يَعْلَمْ, بِهِمْ, أَحَدٌ, فَقَالَ, لَيْسَ, بِشَيْءٍ
Normalized شَيْ‏ءٍ (with ZWNJ) to شَيْءٍ (without ZWNJ)

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ نُوحٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ شُعَيْبٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا بَصِيرٍ يَقُولُ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ طَلَّقَهَا زَوْجُهَا لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ وَقُلْنَا إِنَّهُمْ أَهْلُ بَيْتٍ وَلَمْ يَعْلَمْ بِهِمْ أَحَدٌ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ

narrators.ambiguity_note: Muhammad ibn Ja'far known as Abu al-Abbas; likely Muhammad ibn Ja'far al-Razzaz, a transmitter in al-Kulayni's chains.
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Ja'far Abu al-Abbas al-Razzaz
Ayyub ibn Nuh ibn Darraj, a prominent transmitter and companion of Imam al-Hadi and al-Askari (AS)

narrators.ambiguity_note: In this context refers to Safwan ibn Yahya al-Bajalli, one of the most trusted narrators of the Imami tradition.
narrators.known_identity: Safwan ibn Yahya al-Bajalli (d. 210 AH), among the most reliable narrators
Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb al-Mithammi, a companion of Imam al-Sadiq (AS)

narrators.ambiguity_note: Abu Basir here is Yahya ibn al-Qasim al-Asadi, one of the Four Companions (Ashab al-Ijma')
narrators.known_identity: Abu Basir (Yahya ibn al-Qasim al-Asadi), one of the most trusted companions of Imams al-Baqir and al-Sadiq (AS)
Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (AS), the fifth Imam (d. 114 AH)

key_phrases.phrase_en: it is not anything (null and void)

bn.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: কিছুই নয় — বাতিল ও অকার্যকর ঘোষণার জন্য ব্যবহৃত ফিকহি পরিভাষা
bn.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: সুন্নাহর বিরুদ্ধে — যেমন দুইজন ন্যায়পরায়ণ সাক্ষীর অনুপস্থিতি বা পবিত্রতার অবস্থার বাইরে প্রদান

de.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: Es ist nichts — rechtliche Standardformel für Nichtigkeit und vollständige Ungültigkeit
de.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: Entgegen der Sunna — Fehlen von zwei gerechten Zeugen oder Vollzug außerhalb der rituellen Reinheitsperiode

en.أَهْلُ بَيْتٍ: Here means a private/secluded household, i.e., a family living away from public view, with no witnesses available
en.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: It is not anything — a standard jurisprudential formula for nullity and complete legal invalidity
en.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: Contrary to the Sunnah — referring to divorces that do not meet the prescribed conditions such as: presence of two just witnesses, the woman being in a state of purity (tuhr) without conjugal relations having occurred during it

es.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: No es nada — fórmula jurídica estándar para declarar la nulidad e invalidez total
es.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: Contrario a la Sunnah — ausencia de dos testigos justos o realizado fuera del período de pureza

fa.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: چیزی نیست — اصطلاح فقهی برای بیان بطلان و عدم اعتبار
fa.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: برخلاف سنت — مانند نبود دو شاهد عادل یا وقوع در حالت غیر طهر

fr.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: Cela n'est rien — formule juridique standard pour déclarer la nullité et l'invalidité totale
fr.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: Contrairement à la Sunna — absence de deux témoins justes ou prononcé en dehors de la période de pureté rituelle

id.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: Bukan apa-apa — formula fikih standar untuk menyatakan kebatalan dan ketidakabsahan
id.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: Bertentangan dengan sunnah — seperti ketiadaan dua saksi adil atau dilakukan di luar masa tuhr

ru.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: Это ничто — стандартная правовая формула для обозначения ничтожности и полной недействительности
ru.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: Вопреки Сунне — отсутствие двух справедливых свидетелей или совершение вне периода ритуальной чистоты

tr.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: Bir şey değildir — fıkıhta geçersizlik ve hükümsüzlük için kullanılan standart formül
tr.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: Sünnete aykırı — iki adil tanık bulunmaması veya tuhr (temizlik) dönemi dışında yapılması gibi şartların ihlali

ur.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: کچھ بھی نہیں — فقہی اصطلاح جو طلاق کے کالعدم ہونے پر دلالت کرتی ہے
ur.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: سنت کے خلاف — جیسے دو گواہوں کی غیر موجودگی یا طہر کی حالت کے بغیر

zh.لَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ: 不算什么——宣告无效和完全不具法律效力的标准法学用语
zh.لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ: 违背圣行——例如缺少两名公正证人或在纯洁期（tuhr）之外宣布

seo_questions.bn: শিয়া ইসলামে সুন্নাহর বিরুদ্ধে দেওয়া তালাক কি বৈধ?
seo_questions.de: Ist eine entgegen der Sunna vollzogene Scheidung im schiitischen Islam gültig?
seo_questions.en: Is a divorce performed contrary to the Sunnah valid in Shia Islam?
seo_questions.es: ¿Es válido en el Islam chií un divorcio realizado contrariamente a la Sunnah?
seo_questions.fa: آیا طلاقی که برخلاف سنت داده شده در فقه شیعه معتبر است؟
seo_questions.fr: Un divorce contraire à la Sunna est-il valide dans l'Islam chiite ?
seo_questions.id: Apakah perceraian yang bertentangan dengan sunnah sah dalam Islam Syiah?
seo_questions.ru: Действителен ли развод, совершённый вопреки Сунне, в шиитском исламе?
seo_questions.tr: Şia İslam'ında sünnete aykırı yapılan boşama geçerli midir?
seo_questions.ur: کیا شیعہ اسلام میں سنت کے خلاف دی گئی طلاق معتبر ہے؟
seo_questions.zh: 在什叶派伊斯兰中，违背圣行所进行的离婚有效吗？

similar_content_hints.description: Other hadiths in al-Kafi's Book of Divorce addressing divorces performed contrary to the Book and Sunnah, consistently ruling them invalid — particularly those citing the principle that 'every condition contrary to the Book of God is void.'
Hadiths discussing the requirement for two just witnesses as a condition for a valid divorce (talaq), and what happens when this condition is absent.

Hadiths where Imam al-Baqir or Imam al-Sadiq (AS) are asked about the validity of acts performed outside prescribed Islamic conditions and respond with 'laysa bi-shay'' (it is not anything/null), establishing a recurring formula for legal nullity.

summaries.bn: আবু বাসির ইমাম বাকির (আ.)-কে সুন্নাহর নিয়ম লঙ্ঘন করে দেওয়া তালাক সম্পর্কে জিজ্ঞেস করেন, যেখানে পরিবারটি নিভৃতে বাস করত এবং কোনো সাক্ষী ছিল না। ইমাম রায় দেন যে এমন তালাক সম্পূর্ণরূপে অকার্যকর। এই রায় শিয়া ফিকহের মূলনীতি প্রতিফলিত করে যে তালাক অবশ্যই কুরআন ও সুন্নাহ নির্ধারিত শর্ত পূরণ করে দিতে হবে।
summaries.de: Abu Basir fragt Imam al-Baqir (F) nach einer Scheidung, die gegen die vorgeschriebenen Bedingungen der Sunna verstößt, wobei das Paar als abgeschlossene Familie ohne Zeugen galt. Der Imam urteilte, dass eine solche Scheidung völlig nichtig ist. Dieses Urteil spiegelt das schiitische Rechtsprinzip wider, dass die Scheidung alle im Buch und der Sunna festgelegten Bedingungen strikt erfüllen muss.
summaries.en: Abu Basir narrates that he asked Imam al-Baqir (peace be upon him) about a divorce performed contrary to the prescribed Sunnah method, noting that the couple was a private household with no witnesses. The Imam ruled that such a divorce is completely invalid — 'it is not anything.' This ruling reflects the Shia jurisprudential principle that divorce (talaq) must strictly follow the conditions stipulated in the Book and the Sunnah; a divorce performed outside these conditions has no legal effect whatsoever, regardless of the couple's social circumstances.
summaries.es: Abu Basir pregunta al Imam al-Baqir (P) sobre un divorcio realizado en contra de las condiciones prescritas por la Sunnah, señalando que la pareja era una familia privada sin testigos. El Imam dictaminó que tal divorcio es completamente nulo. Este dictamen refleja el principio jurídico chií de que el divorcio debe cumplir estrictamente las condiciones estipuladas en el Libro y la Sunnah.
summaries.fa: ابوبصیر از امام باقر علیه السلام درباره طلاقی پرسید که برخلاف شرایط مقرر سنت انجام شده بود و زوجین در یک خانواده منزوی بودند. امام حکم کرد که چنین طلاقی کاملاً باطل است. این حکم نشان‌دهنده اصل فقهی شیعه است که طلاق باید کاملاً مطابق با شرایط کتاب و سنت انجام شود.
summaries.fr: Abu Basir interroge l'Imam al-Baqir (P) sur un divorce prononcé en violation des conditions prescrites par la Sunna, en précisant que la famille vivait dans l'isolement sans témoins. L'Imam a statué que ce divorce est entièrement nul et sans effet. Ce jugement illustre le principe juridique chiite selon lequel le divorce doit strictement respecter les conditions stipulées dans le Livre et la Sunna.
summaries.id: Abu Basir bertanya kepada Imam al-Baqir (as) tentang perceraian yang dilakukan bertentangan dengan sunnah, di mana keluarga tersebut tidak dikenal oleh siapapun. Imam menetapkan bahwa perceraian semacam itu sama sekali tidak sah. Ini mencerminkan prinsip fikih Syiah bahwa talak harus memenuhi semua syarat yang ditetapkan dalam al-Quran dan Sunnah.
summaries.ru: Абу Басир спрашивает Имама аль-Бакира (мир ему) о разводе, совершённом в нарушение предписанных условий Сунны, отмечая, что семья жила уединённо без свидетелей. Имам постановил, что такой развод полностью недействителен. Это решение отражает шиитский правовой принцип, согласно которому развод должен строго соответствовать условиям, установленным Книгой и Сунной.
summaries.tr: Ebu Basîr, Imam Bakır'a (a.s.) sünnete aykırı yapılan ve tanıkları olmayan bir boşama hakkında sormuş, İmam 'bir şey değildir' diyerek bu boşamanın tamamen geçersiz olduğuna hükmetmiştir. Bu hüküm, Şia fıkhında boşamanın Kitap ve Sünnet'te öngörülen şartlara uyulması zorunlu olduğunu açıkça ortaya koymaktadır.
summaries.ur: ابو بصیر نے روایت کی ہے کہ انہوں نے امام باقر علیہ السلام سے ایسی طلاق کے بارے میں پوچھا جو مقررہ سنت کے خلاف دی گئی تھی اور جوڑے کا کوئی گواہ نہ تھا۔ امام نے فرمایا کہ ایسی طلاق سرے سے باطل ہے۔ یہ حکم شیعہ فقہ کے اس اصول کی عکاسی کرتا ہے کہ طلاق کے لیے قرآن و سنت کی مقرر کردہ تمام شرائط کا پورا ہونا لازمی ہے۔
summaries.zh: 阿布·巴西尔向伊玛目巴基尔（愿主赐他平安）询问一桩违背圣行所规定条件的离婚，该夫妻是隐居的家庭，无证人在场。伊玛目裁定此类离婚完全无效。这一裁决体现了什叶派法学的原则：离婚必须严格符合《古兰经》和圣行所规定的条件。

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/101)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا بَصِيرٍ يَقُولُ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ طَلَّقَهَا زَوْجُهَا لِغَيْرِ السُّنَّةِ وَ قُلْنَا إِنَّهُمْ أَهْلُ بَيْتٍ وَ لَمْ يَعْلَمْ بِهِمْ أَحَدٌ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ja’far Abu Al Abbas, from Ayoub Bin Nuh, from Safwan, from Yaqoub Bin Shuayb who said, ‘I heard Abu Baseer saying,

‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about a woman whose husband had divorced her to other than the Sunnah, and we said they are a family, and there is no one who knows them. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not with anything’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Ja‘far abu al-‘ Abbas has narrated from Ayyub ibn Nuh from Safwan from Ya’qub ibn Shu’ayb who has said that I heard abu Basir saying the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who is not divorced according to Sunnah and said that they are a family and no one knows them. He (the Imam) said, ‘It does not have any valid effect.’”

translations.bn: আমাদের কয়েকজন সাথী, আহমদ ইবনে মুহাম্মদ থেকে, তিনি আল-হুসাইন ইবনে সাঈদ থেকে, তিনি আন-নাদর ইবনে সুওয়াইদ থেকে, তিনি মুহাম্মদ ইবনে আবি হামযা থেকে, তিনি সাঈদ আল-আ'রাজ থেকে বর্ণনা করেছেন, তিনি বলেছেন,
translations.de: Eine Anzahl unserer Gefährten, von Ahmad ibn Muhammad, von al-Husayn ibn Sa'id, von al-Nadr ibn Suwayd, von Muhammad ibn Abi Hamza, von Sa'id al-A'raj, der sagte:
translations.en: A number of our companions, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad, from al-Husayn ibn Sa'id, from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd, from Muhammad ibn Abi Hamza, from Sa'id al-A'raj who said,
translations.es: Varios de nuestros compañeros, de Ahmad ibn Muhammad, de al-Husayn ibn Sa'id, de al-Nadr ibn Suwayd, de Muhammad ibn Abi Hamza, de Sa'id al-A'raj quien dijo,
translations.fa: عده‌ای از اصحاب ما از احمد بن محمد، از حسین بن سعید، از نضر بن سوید، از محمد بن ابی حمزه، از سعید اعرج روایت کردند که گفت:
translations.fr: Plusieurs de nos compagnons, de Ahmad ibn Muhammad, de al-Husayn ibn Sa'id, de al-Nadr ibn Suwayd, de Muhammad ibn Abi Hamza, de Sa'id al-A'raj qui dit,
translations.id: Sejumlah sahabat kami, dari Ahmad ibn Muhammad, dari al-Husayn ibn Sa'id, dari al-Nadr ibn Suwayd, dari Muhammad ibn Abi Hamza, dari Sa'id al-A'raj yang berkata,
translations.ru: Ряд наших сподвижников, от Ахмада ибн Мухаммада, от аль-Хусейна ибн Саида, от ан-Надра ибн Сувайда, от Мухаммада ибн Аби Хамзы, от Саида аль-А'раджа, который сказал:
translations.tr: Ashâbımızdan bir grup, Ahmed b. Muhammed'den, o da Hüseyin b. Saîd'den, o da Nadr b. Süveyd'den, o da Muhammed b. Ebî Hamza'dan, o da Said el-A'rec'den nakletti, dedi ki:
translations.ur: ہمارے کئی اصحاب نے احمد بن محمد سے، انہوں نے حسین بن سعید سے، انہوں نے نضر بن سوید سے، انہوں نے محمد بن ابی حمزہ سے، انہوں نے سعید الاعرج سے روایت کی کہ انہوں نے کہا،
translations.zh: 我们的若干同伴，从艾哈迈德·本·穆罕默德，从侯赛因·本·赛义德，从纳德尔·本·苏韦德，从穆罕默德·本·阿布·哈姆扎，从赛义德·阿尔吉传述，他说：

translations.bn: আমি আবু আব্দিল্লাহ আলাইহিস সালামকে বলতে শুনেছি: ইবনে উমার তার স্ত্রীকে তিনটি তালাক দিয়েছিলেন এবং সে হায়েযের অবস্থায় ছিল। তখন উমার রাসূলুল্লাহকে জিজ্ঞেস করলেন, তখন তিনি তাকে তার স্ত্রীর কাছে ফিরে যেতে আদেশ করলেন।
translations.de: Ich hörte Abu Abdillah (Friede sei auf ihm) sagen: 'Ibn Umar schied von seiner Frau dreimal, während sie menstruierte. Da fragte Umar den Gesandten Allahs, der ihm befahl, zu ihr zurückzukehren.
translations.en: I heard Abu Abdillah (peace be upon him) saying: 'Ibn Umar divorced his wife three (times) while she was menstruating. So Umar asked the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him and his family), and he ordered him to take her back.
translations.es: Escuché a Abu Abdillah (la paz sea con él) decir: 'Ibn Umar divorció a su esposa tres (veces) mientras ella estaba menstruando. Entonces Umar preguntó al Mensajero de Allah, y él le ordenó que volviera a ella.
translations.fa: از ابو عبدالله علیه السلام شنیدم که می‌فرمود: ابن عمر همسرش را سه طلاقه کرد در حالی که حائض بود. پس عمر از رسول الله صلی الله علیه و آله پرسید و حضرت به او فرمان داد که رجوع کند.
translations.fr: J'ai entendu Abu Abdillah (paix sur lui) dire : « Ibn Umar répudia sa femme trois (fois) alors qu'elle était en état de menstruation. Umar interrogea alors le Messager d'Allah, qui lui ordonna de revenir à elle.
translations.id: Aku mendengar Abu Abdillah alaihissalam berkata: 'Ibnu Umar menceraikan istrinya tiga kali sementara ia sedang haid. Lalu Umar bertanya kepada Rasulullah shallallahu alaihi wa alihi, maka beliau memerintahkannya untuk merujuknya.
translations.ru: Я слышал, как Абу Абдуллах (мир ему) говорил: «Ибн Умар развёл свою жену три (раза), тогда как она была в состоянии месячных. Умар спросил Посланника Аллаха, и тот повелел ему вернуться к ней.
translations.tr: Ebu Abdullah aleyhisselam'ı şöyle söylerken işittim: 'İbn Ömer, hayızlı iken eşini üç talakla boşadı. Ömer de Rasulullah sallallahu aleyhi ve alihi'ye sordu, o da rücû etmesini emretti.
translations.ur: میں نے ابو عبداللہ علیہ السلام کو فرماتے ہوئے سنا: ابن عمر نے اپنی بیوی کو تین طلاقیں دیں جبکہ وہ حائضہ تھی۔ تو عمر نے رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ سے پوچھا، تو آپ نے اسے رجوع کا حکم دیا۔
translations.zh: 我听到艾布·阿卜杜拉（愿主赐他平安）说：伊本·欧麦尔在其妻子处于月经期间将她离婚三次。于是欧麦尔去询问安拉的使者，使者命令他复婚。

translations.bn: তখন আমি বললাম: লোকেরা বলছে যে সে শুধু একবার তালাক দিয়েছে এবং সে হায়েযের অবস্থায় ছিল। তখন তিনি (আলাইহিস সালাম) বললেন: তাহলে কেন সে রাসূলুল্লাহকে জিজ্ঞেস করেছিল, যদি সে নিজেই তার কাছে ফিরে যাওয়ার অধিক ক্ষমতাবান ছিল? তারা মিথ্যা বলেছে! বরং সে তাকে তিনটি তালাক দিয়েছিল, তখন রাসূলুল্লাহ তাকে তার কাছে ফিরে যেতে আদেশ করলেন, তারপর বললেন: যদি তুমি চাও, তালাক দাও, আর যদি চাও, রেখে দাও।
translations.de: Da sagte ich: 'Die Leute sagen, er habe sie nur einmal geschieden, während sie menstruierte'. Da sagte er (AS): 'Dann warum fragte er den Gesandten Allahs, wenn er mehr berechtigt war, sie zurückzunehmen? Sie logen! Vielmehr schied er von ihr dreimal, und der Gesandte Allahs befahl ihm, zu ihr zurückzukehren, dann sagte er: Wenn du willst, scheide, und wenn du willst, behalte sie'.
translations.en: So I said: 'The people are saying that he only divorced her once while she was menstruating'. So he (AS) said: 'Then for what reason did he ask the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him and his family), if he had the right to take her back (anyway)? They lied! Rather, he divorced her three (times), so the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him and his family) ordered him to take her back, then said: If you wish, divorce, and if you wish, keep (her)'.
translations.es: Entonces dije: 'La gente dice que solamente la divorció una vez mientras ella estaba menstruando'. Entonces él (AS) dijo: '¿Entonces para qué preguntó al Mensajero de Allah, si él era más dueño de devolverla? ¡Mintieron! Sino que la divorció tres (veces), y el Mensajero de Allah le ordenó que volviera a ella, luego dijo: Si deseas, divorcia, y si deseas, retén (a ella)'.
translations.fa: پس گفتم: مردم می‌گویند که او فقط یک طلاق داده در حالی که حائض بود. پس فرمود: پس برای چه از رسول الله پرسید اگر خودش بر رجعت او تسلط داشت؟ دروغ گفتند! بلکه او را سه طلاقه کرد و رسول الله به او فرمان داد که رجوع کند، سپس فرمود: اگر خواستی طلاق بده و اگر خواستی نگه دار.
translations.fr: Alors je dis : 'Les gens disent qu'il ne la répudia qu'une seule fois alors qu'elle était en état de menstruation'. Il dit alors : 'Pour quelle raison consulta-t-il le Messager d'Allah, s'il était plus maître de la reprendre ? Ils ont menti ! Mais il la répudia trois (fois), et le Messager d'Allah lui ordonna de la reprendre, puis dit : Si tu le souhaites, répudie, et si tu le souhaites, garde-la'.
translations.id: Lalu aku berkata: 'Orang-orang mengatakan bahwa ia hanya menceraikannya sekali sementara ia sedang haid'. Maka beliau berkata: 'Maka untuk apa dia bertanya kepada Rasulullah, jika ia lebih berhak untuk merujuknya? Mereka berdusta! Bahkan ia menceraikannya tiga kali, dan Rasulullah memerintahkannya untuk merujuknya, kemudian berkata: Jika engkau menghendaki, maka ceraikan, dan jika engkau menghendaki, maka pertahankan'.
translations.ru: Тогда я сказал: «Люди говорят, что он развёл её только один раз, когда она была в состоянии месячных». Тогда он (мир ему) сказал: «Тогда зачем же он спросил Посланника Аллаха, если он был более правомочен вернуть её? Они солгали! Он развёл её три (раза), и Посланник Аллаха повелел ему вернуться к ней, затем сказал: Если желаешь — разведись, а если желаешь — удержи её».
translations.tr: Ben dedim ki: 'İnsanlar onun hanımını sadece bir talakla boşadığını söylüyorlar'. Bunun üzerine imam dedi ki: 'Peki o eğer rücû'a daha yetkili idiyse, Rasulullah'a niçin sorduysa? Yalan söylediler! Bilakis onu üç talakla boşadı, Rasulullah ona rücû etmesini emretti, sonra da dedi ki: Dilersen boşa, dilersen tut'.
translations.ur: تو میں نے عرض کیا: لوگ کہتے ہیں کہ اس نے صرف ایک طلاق دی تھی جبکہ وہ حائضہ تھی۔ تو آپ علیہ السلام نے فرمایا: پھر اس نے رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ سے کیوں پوچھا اگر وہ خود اس کی رجعت کا حق رکھتا تھا؟ انہوں نے جھوٹ بولا! بلکہ اس نے تین طلاقیں دیں، تو رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ نے اسے رجوع کا حکم دیا، پھر فرمایا: اگر چاہو تو طلاق دو اور اگر چاہو تو رکھ لو۔
translations.zh: 我说：人们说他只在妻子月经期间离婚了一次。于是他（愿主赐他平安）说：那么他为什么要去询问安拉的使者，如果他自己更有权复婚呢？他们撒谎了！他实际上离婚了三次，安拉的使者命令他复婚，然后说：如果你愿意，就离婚；如果你愿意，就留住她。

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ سُوَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ سَعِيدٍ الْأَعْرَجِ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ يَقُولُ طَلَّقَ ابْنُ عُمَرَ امْرَأَتَهُ ثَلَاثاً وَهِيَ حَائِضٌ فَسَأَلَ عُمَرُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ فَأَمَرَهُ أَنْ يُرَاجِعَهَا فَقُلْتُ إِنَّ النَّاسَ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّمَا طَلَّقَهَا وَاحِدَةً وَهِيَ حَائِضٌ فَقَالَ فَلِأَيِّ شَيْءٍ سَأَلَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ إِذَا كَانَ هُوَ أَمْلَكَ بِرَجْعَتِهَا كَذَبُوا وَلَكِنَّهُ طَلَّقَهَا ثَلَاثاً فَأَمَرَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَنْ يُرَاجِعَهَا ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنْ شِئْتَ فَطَلِّقْ وَإِنْ شِئْتَ فَأَمْسِكْ

narrators.ambiguity_note: Collective term referring to multiple unnamed transmitters in al-Kulayni's circle
Likely Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa al-Ash'ari or Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid al-Barqi
narrators.known_identity: Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa al-Ash'ari (d. ~280 AH), prominent hadith transmitter
al-Husayn ibn Sa'id al-Ahwazi (3rd century AH), prolific transmitter and author of 30 books
al-Nadr ibn Suwayd al-Sayrafi al-Kufi, reliable transmitter of hadith
Muhammad ibn Abi Hamza al-Thimali, Kufi narrator
Sa'id ibn 'Abd al-Rahman al-A'raj, Kufi companion of Imam al-Sadiq (AS)

key_phrases.phrase_en: while she was menstruating (divorce during hayd)

key_phrases.phrase_ar: إِنْ شِئْتَ فَطَلِّقْ وَإِنْ شِئْتَ فَأَمْسِكْ
key_phrases.phrase_en: If you wish, divorce; if you wish, retain

bn.حائض: হায়েয — মাসিক ঋতুস্রাব; এই অবস্থায় তালাক নিষিদ্ধ
bn.رجعة: রুজু' — ইদ্দতের মধ্যে রিজওয়ী তালাক প্রত্যাহার

de.حيض: Hayd — Menstruation; Scheidung ist während dieser Zeit verboten
de.رجعة: Ruju' — Widerruf der widerruflichen Scheidung während der Wartezeit (Iddah)

en.حَائِضٌ: a woman in the state of menstruation (hayd), during which divorce is forbidden according to the correct divorce procedure
en.رَجْعَةٌ: ruju' — the revocation of a revocable (raj'i) divorce within the waiting period ('iddah)
en.رَسُولُ اللَّهِ: the Messenger of Allah — Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him and his family)
en.طَلَاقٌ: divorce (talaq) — the formal dissolution of a marriage

es.حيض: hayd — estado de menstruación; el divorcio está prohibido durante este período
es.رجعة: ruju' — revocación del divorcio revocable dentro del período de 'iddah

fa.حائض: حائض — زنی که در حالت عادت ماهانه باشد
fa.رجعت: رجعت — بازگشت از طلاق رجعی در دوران عدت

fr.حيض: hayd — état de menstruation ; le divorce est interdit durant cette période
fr.رجعة: ruju' — révocation du divorce révocable pendant la période d'iddah
fr.طلاق: talaq — répudiation formelle en droit islamique

id.حيض: haid — menstruasi; perceraian saat haid tidak sah menurut fiqih
id.رجعة: ruju' — mencabut talak raj'i dalam masa iddah
id.طلاق: talak — perceraian resmi dalam pernikahan Islam

ru.حيض: хайд — менструация; развод в этот период запрещён
ru.رجعة: рудж'у — отзыв отзывного развода в период идды
ru.طلاق: талак — формальный развод в исламском праве

tr.حائض: hayızlı — adet kanaması durumundaki kadın; bu dönemde boşanma yasaktır
tr.رجعة: rücû — bain olmayan boşanmadan iddette dönüş

ur.حائض: حائض — وہ عورت جو حیض کی حالت میں ہو، اس دوران طلاق ممنوع ہے
ur.رجعت: رجعت — عدت کے دوران رجعی طلاق کو واپس لینا
ur.طلاق: طلاق — ازدواجی تعلق کا رسمی خاتمہ

zh.حيض: 月经期（hayd）——此期间离婚无效
zh.رجعة: 鲁朱（ruju'）——在伊达期内撤回可撤销离婚
zh.طلاق: 塔拉克（talaq）——伊斯兰正式离婚

seo_questions.bn: ইবনে উমার কি তার স্ত্রীকে এক বা তিনবার তালাক দিয়েছিলেন? ইমাম আল-সাদিক এ বিষয়ে কী বলেছেন?
seo_questions.de: Wie oft hat Ibn Umar seine Frau geschieden? Was sagt Imam al-Sadiq dazu?
seo_questions.en: Did Ibn Umar divorce his wife once or three times while she was menstruating? What does Imam al-Sadiq say?
seo_questions.es: ¿Cuántas veces divorció Ibn Umar a su esposa? ¿Qué dice el Imam al-Sadiq al respecto?
seo_questions.fa: آیا ابن عمر همسرش را یک‌بار طلاق داد یا سه‌بار؟ نظر امام صادق علیه السلام چیست؟
seo_questions.fr: Ibn Umar a-t-il répudié sa femme une ou trois fois ? Quelle est la position de l'Imam al-Sadiq à ce sujet ?
seo_questions.id: Apakah Ibnu Umar menceraikan istrinya satu atau tiga kali? Apa kata Imam al-Sadiq tentang hal ini?
seo_questions.ru: Сколько раз Ибн Умар развёлся со своей женой? Что говорит об этом имам аль-Садык?
seo_questions.tr: İbn Ömer karısını kaç talakla boşadı? İmam Sadık aleyhisselam'ın bu konudaki görüşü nedir?
seo_questions.ur: کیا ابن عمر نے اپنی بیوی کو ایک یا تین طلاق دی؟ امام صادق علیہ السلام کا موقف کیا ہے؟
seo_questions.zh: 伊本·欧麦尔将其妻子离婚了几次？伊玛目萨迪格对此有何看法？

similar_content_hints.description: Other hadiths in al-Kafi's chapter on divorce discussing the conditions that make talaq valid or invalid, particularly regarding the timing of divorce and the menstrual cycle.
Narrations where Imam al-Sadiq (AS) corrects misattributed or distorted reports about the conduct of the Prophet's companions, particularly regarding legal rulings.
Hadiths clarifying the ruling on triple divorce (talaq al-bid'ah) and its standing in Shia jurisprudence compared to Sunni practice.

summaries.bn: এই হাদিসটি সাঈদ আল-আ'রাজের মাধ্যমে ইমাম আল-সাদিক আলাইহিস সালাম থেকে বর্ণিত। ইমাম ইবনে উমারের তালাকের ঘটনায় সুন্নি বর্ণনাকে প্রত্যাখ্যান করেন এবং যুক্তি দেন যে যদি একটি মাত্র রিজওয়ী তালাক হত, তবে নবীর কাছে জিজ্ঞেস করার প্রয়োজন ছিল না। এটি শিয়া ফিকহে হায়েয অবস্থায় তালাকের অবৈধতার অন্যতম দলিল।
summaries.de: Dieser Hadith wird von Sa'id al-A'raj vom Imam al-Sadiq (Friede sei auf ihm) überliefert. Der Imam behandelt die historische Angelegenheit der Scheidung von Ibn Umar und widerlegt die sunnitische Überlieferung, dass es sich nur um eine Scheidung handelte. Das Argument des Imams ist: Wäre es eine einzelne widerrufliche Scheidung gewesen, hätte Ibn Umar keinen Grund gehabt, den Propheten zu befragen. Dieser Hadith ist eine wichtige Grundlage im schiitischen Familienrecht.
summaries.en: This hadith, narrated through Sa'id al-A'raj from Imam al-Sadiq (AS), addresses the historical incident of Ibn Umar's divorce and directly refutes the Sunni tradition that it was a single divorce. The Imam argues that if Ibn Umar had simply pronounced one revocable divorce during menstruation, he would have had the automatic right to revoke it without needing to consult the Prophet. The need to consult the Prophet proves it was a triple divorce — a divorce that does not conform to the Quran and Sunnah and yet the Prophet ordered its revocation, setting an important precedent in Islamic family law.
summaries.es: Este hadiz, narrado a través de Sa'id al-A'raj desde el Imam al-Sadiq (AS), aborda el incidente histórico del divorcio de Ibn Umar y refuta la tradición sunita de que fue un solo divorcio. El argumento del Imam es que si hubiera sido un único divorcio revocable, Ibn Umar no habría necesitado consultar al Profeta. Esto constituye un importante precedente en el derecho de familia islámico chiita.
summaries.fa: این حدیث از امام صادق علیه السلام از طریق سعید اعرج روایت شده است. امام به صراحت روایت سنی درباره طلاق ابن عمر را رد می‌کنند و استدلال می‌کنند که اگر طلاق رجعی تک‌گانه بود، نیازی به مشورت با پیامبر نبود. این حدیث یکی از دلایل فقه شیعه بر بطلان طلاق در زمان حیض است.
summaries.fr: Ce hadith, transmis par Sa'id al-A'raj depuis l'Imam al-Sadiq (paix sur lui), traite de l'incident du répudiation d'Ibn Umar et réfute la tradition sunnite selon laquelle il s'agissait d'un seul divorce. L'Imam argumente que si c'eût été un divorce révocable unique, Ibn Umar n'aurait pas eu besoin de consulter le Prophète. Ce hadith est un fondement du droit familial chiite interdisant le divorce pendant les menstrues.
summaries.id: Hadis ini diriwayatkan dari Imam al-Sadiq alaihissalam melalui Sa'id al-A'raj. Imam membantah klaim Sunni bahwa Ibnu Umar hanya mengucapkan talak satu. Argumen Imam adalah: jika hanya talak raj'i satu kali, Ibnu Umar tidak perlu bertanya kepada Nabi karena ia berhak merujuk sendiri. Ini menjadi salah satu dalil dalam fikih Syiah tentang batalnya talak saat haid.
summaries.ru: Этот хадис передаётся от имама аль-Садыка (мир ему) через Са'ида аль-А'раджа. Имам рассматривает исторический инцидент с разводом Ибн Умара и опровергает суннитское предание о том, что развод был совершён один раз. Аргумент имама состоит в том, что если бы был произнесён один отзывной развод, Ибн Умару не нужно было бы консультироваться с Пророком. Этот хадис является одним из оснований шиитского семейного права, запрещающего развод во время менструации.
summaries.tr: Bu hadis, Sa'id el-A'rec aracılığıyla İmam Sadık aleyhisselam'dan nakledilmektedir. İmam, İbn Ömer'in boşanma olayını ele alarak Sünnî geleneğin tek talak iddiasını reddetmektedir. İmam'ın argümanı şudur: Eğer tek bir ric'î talak olsaydı, İbn Ömer'in Peygamber'e danışmasına gerek kalmazdı. Bu hadis, Şiî fıkhında hayız döneminde verilen boşamanın geçersizliğini desteklemektedir.
summaries.ur: یہ حدیث سعید اعرج کے واسطے سے امام صادق علیہ السلام سے منقول ہے۔ امام علیہ السلام ابن عمر کے طلاق کے واقعے کی تردید فرماتے ہیں اور اثبات کرتے ہیں کہ وہ تین طلاق تھی نہ کہ ایک۔ امام کا استدلال یہ ہے کہ اگر ایک رجعی طلاق ہوتی تو رسول اللہ سے پوچھنے کی ضرورت ہی نہ ہوتی کیونکہ رجوع کا اختیار خود بخود ہوتا۔
summaries.zh: 这段圣训通过赛义德·阿尔吉从伊玛目萨迪格（愿主赐他平安）传述。伊玛目驳斥了逊尼派关于伊本·欧麦尔只进行了一次离婚的说法，并论证称：如果只是单次可撤销离婚，伊本·欧麦尔无需咨询先知。这是什叶派家庭法中禁止月经期间离婚的重要依据之一。

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/101)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ طَلَّقَ ابْنُ عُمَرَ امْرَأَتَهُ ثَلَاثاً وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ فَسَأَلَ عُمَرُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَأَمَرَهُ أَنْ يُرَاجِعَهَا فَقُلْتُ إِنَّ النَّاسَ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّمَا طَلَّقَهَا وَاحِدَةً وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ فَقَالَ فَلِأَيِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ سَأَلَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِذَا كَانَ هُوَ أَمْلَكَ بِرَجْعَتِهَا كَذَبُوا وَ لَكِنَّهُ طَلَّقَهَا ثَلَاثاً فَأَمَرَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَنْ يُرَاجِعَهَا ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنْ شِئْتَ فَطَلِّقْ وَ إِنْ شِئْتَ فَأَمْسِكْ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Saeed Al A’raj who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Ibn Umar divorced his wife three (times) and she was menstruating. So Umar asked Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, so he<sup>saww</sup> ordered him that he should return to her’. So I said, ‘The people are saying that, rather his divorce was one divorce, and she was menstruating’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So for which thing did he ask Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, when he had the control with returning to her? They are lying! But he divorced her three (times), so Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> ordered him that he should return to her, then said: ‘If you so desire, so divorce, and if you so desire, so keep’.
en.sarwar: 9. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id, from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from Muhammad ibn abu Hamzah from Sa‘id al-A’raj who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, state this Hadith. ‘Ibn ‘Umar divorced his wife three times at the same place and time when she experienced Hayd (menses). He asked the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, and he commanded him to go back to his wife.’ I then said, ‘People say that he divorced only once when she experienced Hayd (menses).’ He (the Imam) asked, ‘What for, then, did he ask the Messenger of Allah if he was able to go back to her? They speak a lie. He divorced three times at the same place and time, then the Messenger of Allah commanded him to go back to her and then divorce her if he wanted or keep her if he so willed.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/102)
text: هُ سُئِلَ عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ سَمِعَتْ أَنَّ رَجُلًا طَلَّقَهَا وَ جَحَدَ ذَلِكَ أَ تُقِيمُ مَعَهُ قَالَ نَعَمْ فَإِنَّ طَلَاقَهُ بِغَيْرِ شُهُودٍ لَيْسَ بِطَلَاقٍ وَ الطَّلَاقُ لِغَيْرِ الْعِدَّةِ لَيْسَ بِطَلَاقٍ وَ لَا يَحِلُّ لَهُ أَنْ يَفْعَلَ فَيُطَلِّقَهَا بِغَيْرِ شُهُودٍ وَ لِغَيْرِ الْعِدَّةِ الَّتِي أَمَرَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Musa Bin Bakr, from Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about a woman who heard that a man divorced her, and he denied that. Should she stay with him?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, for a divorce without witnesses is not a divorce, and the divorce to other than the waiting period is not a divorce, it is not Permissible for him that he should do so by divorcing her without witnesses and to other than the waiting period which Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic has Commanded with’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Musa ibn Bakr from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked about the case of a woman who hears that the man has divorced her but he denies it: if she can stay with him. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, because divorce without witness is not a divorce, also divorce without waiting period is not a divorce. It is not lawful to divorce without witnesses and without waiting period that Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has commanded to do.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/102)
text: هُمَا قَالَا إِذَا طَلَّقَ الرَّجُلُ فِي دَمِ النِّفَاسِ أَوْ طَلَّقَهَا بَعْدَ مَا يَمَسُّهَا فَلَيْسَ طَلَاقُهُ إِيَّاهَا بِطَلَاقٍ وَ إِنْ طَلَّقَهَا فِي اسْتِقْبَالِ عِدَّتِهَا طَاهِراً مِنْ غَيْرِ جِمَاعٍ وَ لَمْ يُشْهِدْ عَلَى ذَلِكَ رَجُلَيْنِ عَدْلَيْنِ فَلَيْسَ طَلَاقُهُ إِيَّاهَا بِطَلَاقٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Umar Bin Azina, from Zurara, and Muhammad Bin Muslim, and Bukeyr Bin Ayn, and Bureyd, and Fuzayl, and Ismail Al Azraq, and Ma’mar Bin Yahya,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> and Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> both of them having said: ‘When the man divorces during blood of the childbirth, or divorces her after having touched her, so his divorcing her is not with a (valid) divorce, and if he divorces her during the commencement of her waiting period, (when she is) clean from other than copulation, and two just witnesses did not witness upon that, so his divorcing her is not a (valid) divorce’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn ‘Udhaynah from Zurarah and Muhammad ibn Muslim and Bukayr ibn ’A‘yan and Burayd and Fudayl and ’Isma’il al-Azraq and Mu’ammar ibn Yahya from abu Ja‘far and abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, who has said the following: “When a man during a woman’s experiencing blood discharge because of childbirth or after going to bed with her divorces, such divorce is not a valid divorce. A divorce at such time when commencing waiting period is possible and valid, that it is in a menses-free time but without the presence of two just witnesses, such divorce also is not a valid divorce.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/102)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ يُطَلِّقُ امْرَأَتَهُ فِي طُهْرٍ مِنْ غَيْرِ جِمَاعٍ ثُمَّ يُرَاجِعُهَا مِنْ يَوْمِهِ ثُمَّ يُطَلِّقُهَا تَبِينُ مِنْهُ بِثَلَاثِ تَطْلِيقَاتٍ فِي طُهْرٍ وَاحِدٍ فَقَالَ خَالَفَ السُّنَّةَ قُلْتُ فَلَيْسَ يَنْبَغِي لَهُ إِذَا هُوَ رَاجَعَهَا أَنْ يُطَلِّقَهَا إِلَّا فِي طُهْرٍ آخَرَ قَالَ نَعَمْ قُلْتُ حَتَّى يُجَامِعَ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7th Imam<sup>asws</sup>), said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who divorced his wife during (her being) clean without copulating with her. Then he returned to her from that day. Then divorced her, manifesting from it with three divorces during one purity’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Opposite to the Sunnah’. I said, ‘So is it not befitting for him when he returns to her that he should divorce her except during another purity?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’. I said, ‘Until he sleeps with her?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 12. Abu Ali al-Ash‘ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, (Musa), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who divorces his wife in a menses-free period during which he has not gone to bed with her. He then goes back to her on the same day, then divorces her: if it becomes irrevocable with three divorces during one menses-free period. He (the Imam) said, ‘He has opposed the Sunnah.’ I then asked, ‘Is it necessary after going back to his wife to divorce her in another menses-free period of time?’ He (the Imam) replied, ‘Yes, it is necessary.’ I said, ‘So that he can go to bed with her?’ He (the Imam) replied, ‘Yes, he can do so.”’

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/103)
text: مَنْ طَلَّقَ بِغَيْرِ شُهُودٍ فَلَيْسَ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail Bin Bazie, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who divorces without witnesses, so it is not with anything’.
en.sarwar: 13. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il ibn Bazi‘ from Muhammad ibn al- Fudayl from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one divorces his wife without witnesses it does not become of any valid effect.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/103)
text: قَدِمَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِالْكُوفَةِ فَقَالَ إِنِّي طَلَّقْتُ امْرَأَتِي بَعْدَ مَا طَهُرَتْ مِنْ مَحِيضِهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ أُجَامِعَهَا فَقَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أَشْهَدْتَ رَجُلَيْنِ ذَوَيْ عَدْلٍ كَمَا أَمَرَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَقَالَ لَا فَقَالَ اذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ طَلَاقَكَ لَيْسَ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ .

en.hubeali: Sahl, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from Umar Bin Yazeed, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,

‘A man came over to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> at Al-Kufa, so he said, ‘I divorced my wife after she was clean from her menstruation, before I slept with her’. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Did you get two just witnesses just as Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic had Commanded?’ So he said, ‘No’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Go, for your divorce is not with anything’.
en.sarwar: 14. Sahl has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sama‘ah from ‘Umar ibn Yazid from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Once, a man in al-Kufah came to ’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and said, ‘I have divorced my wife after she became clean from her Hayd (menses) and before I went to bed with her.’ ’Amir al- Mu’minin asked, ‘Did you ask two just men to witness as Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has commanded to do?’ He replied, ‘No, I did not do so.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Your divorce in not valid.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/103)
text: مَنْ طَلَّقَ امْرَأَتَهُ ثَلَاثاً فِي مَجْلِسٍ وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ فَلَيْسَ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ وَ قَدْ رَدَّ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) طَلَاقَ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ إِذَا طَلَّقَ امْرَأَتَهُ ثَلَاثاً وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ فَأَبْطَلَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) ذَلِكَ الطَّلَاقَ.
وَ قَالَ كُلُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ خَالَفَ كِتَابَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَهُوَ رَدٌّ إِلَى كِتَابِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ قَالَ لَا طَلَاقَ إِلَّا فِي عِدَّةٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said; ‘The one who divorces his wife three (times) in one sitting, and she is menstruating, so it is invalid, and Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> had rejected a divorce of Abdullah Bin Umar when he divorced his wife three (times) and she was menstruating. So Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> invalidated that divorce’.

And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Everything which opposes the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, so it is returned to the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no divorce except in a waiting period’.
en.sarwar: 15. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one divorces his wife three times at the same place and time it does not become of any valid effect. The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, rejected the divorce of ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Umar when he divorced his wife with three divorces when she experienced Hayd (menses). The Messenger of Allah called it an invalid divorce saying, ‘Whatever is against the book of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, must return to the book of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious.’ He (the Messenger of Allah) said, ‘Divorce without waiting period is not valid.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/104)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي سَأَلْتُ عَمْرَو بْنَ عُبَيْدٍ عَنْ طَلَاقِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ فَقَالَ طَلَّقَهَا وَ هِيَ طَامِثٌ وَاحِدَةً قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَ فَلَا قُلْتُمْ لَهُ إِذَا طَلَّقَهَا وَاحِدَةً وَ هِيَ طَامِثاً كَانَتْ أَوْ غَيْرَ طَامِثٍ فَهُوَ أَمْلَكُ بِرَجْعَتِهَا قَالَ قَدْ قُلْتُ لَهُ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَذَبَ عَلَيْهِ لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ بَلْ طَلَّقَهَا ثَلَاثاً فَرَدَّهَا النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ أَمْسِكْ أَوْ طَلِّقْ عَلَى السُّنَّةِ إِنْ أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تُطَلِّقَ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Muhammad Bin Ismail Bin Bazie, from Ali Bin Al Noman, from Saeed Al A’araj who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I asked Amro Bin Ubeyd about divorce of Ibn Umar, so he said, ‘He divorced her and she was with one menstruation’. Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So did you not say to him, ‘When he divorced her and she was with a menstruation, or she was without a menstruation, so he had control with returning to her?’ He said, ‘I had said that to him’. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He has lied against him, may Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Curse him. But he divorced her three (times), so the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> rejected it, so he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Keep or divorce upon the Sunnah, if you intend to divorce’.
en.sarwar: 16. Abu Ali al-Ash‘ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il ibn Bazi‘ from Ali ibn al- Nu’man from Sa‘id al-A’raj who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘I asked ‘Amr ibn ‘Ubayd about the divorce of ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Umar and he said, “He divorced her once when she experienced Hayd (menses).”’ Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said, ‘Why did you not say to him, “If he divorced her once during her experiencing Hayd (menses) or when she did not experience Hayd (menses), he had more authority to go back to his wife.’ I said, ‘I did say so.’ He (the Imam) then said, ‘He has not spoken the truth, may Allah condemn him. He divorced three times but the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, rejected it and said, “You can keep your wife or divorce her according to Sunnah if you wanted.’””

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/104)
text: كُلُّ طَلَاقٍ لِغَيْرِ الْعِدَّةِ فَلَيْسَ بِطَلَاقٍ أَنْ يُطَلِّقَهَا وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ أَوْ فِي دَمِ نِفَاسِهَا أَوْ بَعْدَ مَا يَغْشَاهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ تَحِيضَ فَلَيْسَ طَلَاقُهَا بِطَلَاقٍ فَإِنْ طَلَّقَهَا لِلْعِدَّةِ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ وَاحِدَةٍ فَلَيْسَ الْفَضْلُ عَلَى الْوَاحِدَةِ بِطَلَاقٍ وَ إِنْ طَلَّقَهَا لِلْعِدَّةِ بِغَيْرِ شَاهِدَيْ عَدْلٍ فَلَيْسَ طَلَاقُهُ بِطَلَاقٍ وَ لَا تَجُوزُ فِيهِ شَهَادَةُ النِّسَاءِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Azina, from Bukeyr, and someone else,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Every divorce without a waiting period, is not with a (valid) divorce, if he divorces her and she is menstruating, or in blood of childbirth, or after he had overwhelmed (copulated) with her before she menstruated, so his divorce is not a (valid) divorce. So if he were to divorce her to the waiting period more than once, so there is no preference (of the second one) over the one with a divorce; and if he divorces her to the waiting period without two just witnesses, so his divorce is not with a (valid) divorce, nor is there allowed with regards to it, the testimony of the women’.
en.sarwar: 17. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Udhaynah from Bukayr and others who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Every divorce without waiting period is not a valid divorce, or divorce during her experiencing Hayd (menses), Nifas (childbirth), after going to bed with her before her Hayd (menses), such divorces are not valid. If one divorces with waiting period more than once the extra one does not have any valid effect. If one divorces with waiting period without just witnesses, it also is not a divorce and women’s witnessing is not sufficient.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/104)
text: كُنْتُ عِنْدَهُ إِذْ مَرَّ بِهِ نَافِعٌ مَوْلَى ابْنِ عُمَرَ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) أَنْتَ الَّذِي تَزْعُمُ أَنَّ ابْنَ عُمَرَ طَلَّقَ امْرَأَتَهُ وَاحِدَةً وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ فَأَمَرَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عُمَرَ أَنْ يَأْمُرَهُ أَنْ يُرَاجِعَهَا قَالَ نَعَمْ فَقَالَ لَهُ كَذَبْتَ وَ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَى ابْنِ عُمَرَ أَنَا سَمِعْتُ ابْنَ عُمَرَ يَقُولُ طَلَّقْتُهَا عَلَى عَهْدِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) ثَلَاثاً فَرَدَّهَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَلَيَّ وَ أَمْسَكْتُهَا بَعْدَ الطَّلَاقِ فَاتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَا نَافِعُ وَ لَا تَرْوِ عَلَى ابْنِ عُمَرَ الْبَاطِلَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, form his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Azina, from Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I was in his<sup>asws</sup> presence when Nafau, a slave of Ibn Umar passed by. So (I recalled) Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘Are you the one who is alleging that Ibn Umar divorced his wife once and she was menstruating, so Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> ordered Umar that he should instruct him to return to her?’ He said, ‘Yes’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘You lie, by the One<sup>azwj</sup> there is not God except for Him<sup>azwj</sup>, upon Ibn Umar. I<sup>asws</sup> heard Ibn Umar saying: ‘I divorced her in the era of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> three (times), so Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> rejected it upon me, and I kept her after the divorce. Therefore, fear Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, O Nafau, and do not report falsehood upon Ibn Umar!’
en.sarwar: 18. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Udhaynah from Zurarah who has said the following: “Once, I was with abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when, Nafi’ Mawla’ ibn ’Umar came to visit him (the Imam). Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, asked him, ‘Are you the one who believes that ibn ‘Umar divorced his wife once during her experiencing Hayd (menses) and the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, commanded ‘Umar to ask him to go back to his wife?’ He replied, ‘Yes, that is correct.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘You have spoken a lie against ibn ‘Umar, by Allah, besides whom no one deserves worship. I heard ibn ‘Umar saying, “I divorced her during the time of the Messenger of Allah, three divorces but the Messenger of Allah reversed it on me and I kept her after divorce.” O Nafi‘ you must have fear of Allah and do not narrate falsehood against ibn ‘Umar.’”
